prompt: Unlock the bedroom door please.
eval_note: Correct if the agent sets espID=3 servo=false and confirms the bedroom is unlocked. No other appliances should be changed.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Unlock bedroom door
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=false
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm bedroom unlocked

prompt: What is the livingroom temperature right now?
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads espID=1 tem and reports the value. Should NOT change any appliances. A simple sensor read and report.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Livingroom temperature?
A->>C: get espID=1 tem
C-->>A: temperature value
A-->>U: report livingroom temperature

prompt: Turn on every single light in the house right now.
eval_note: Correct if the agent turns on all 6 lights: espID=1 led1=true, espID=2 led1=true, espID=2 led2=true, espID=3 led1=true, espID=3 led2=true, espID=3 led3=true. All 6 commands must be issued.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Turn on all lights
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=true
A->>C: set espID=3 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=3 led2=true
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm all 6 lights turned on across the house

prompt: Set all fans in the house to maximum speed and open the main door fully.
eval_note: Correct if the agent sets espID=1 motor1=100, espID=2 motor1=100, espID=3 motor1=100, and espID=2 motor2=100. Four commands total.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: All fans max and open main door
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=100
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=100
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=100
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=100
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm all fans at 100% and main door fully open

prompt: I'm about to take an important phone call. I need it really quiet around here.
eval_note: Correct if the agent infers that fans create noise and turns off or reduces fans in the user's likely room. Closing the door to reduce outside noise is acceptable. Should NOT turn on appliances that make noise. If unclear which room, the agent may ask or assume the room with PIR motion.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Need quiet for phone call
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=0
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: explain all fans turned off and door closed for quiet environment

prompt: It smells really musty and stale in the bedroom, like the air hasn't circulated in days.
eval_note: Correct if the agent infers ventilation is needed: open the curtain for fresh air (motor2=50-100), turn on bedroom fan for circulation (motor1=40-60). May also check outside temperature to ensure outdoor air is reasonable before opening. Should NOT close things further.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Musty bedroom, needs air
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=80
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=50
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: explain curtain opened and fan on to circulate fresh air into bedroom

prompt: If the hallway main door is currently open and there is no motion detected in the hallway, close the door for security. Otherwise leave it as is.
eval_note: Correct if the agent first reads espID=2 motor2 (door) and espID=2 pir (motion), then only closes the door if it is open AND no motion is detected. Must check both before deciding. If either condition is not met, no action taken.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Close door if open and no motion
A->>C: get espID=2 motor2
A->>C: get espID=2 pir
C-->>A: door status and PIR value
alt door open AND no motion
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=0
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: door was open with no one near, closed for security
else door closed OR motion detected
A-->>U: no action needed - conditions not met

prompt: Check temperatures in all rooms. For any room where the temperature exceeds 30 degrees Celsius, set that room's fan to 70%. Leave other rooms unchanged.
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads temperature from espID=1, espID=2, and espID=3, then conditionally sets motor1=70 ONLY in rooms above 30C. Must check all three rooms before acting. Should report which rooms were adjusted and which were fine.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Fan to 70% in rooms above 30C
A->>C: get espID=1 tem
A->>C: get espID=2 tem
A->>C: get espID=3 tem
C-->>A: temperatures
alt room temp > 30C
A->>C: set motor1=70 for that room
C-->>A: success
end
A-->>U: report which rooms exceeded 30C and were adjusted

prompt: A guest is arriving in 25 minutes. Right now, turn on the livingroom and hallway lights and set up the livingroom fan to 35%. Also add a note for today: 'Guest visiting - served tea and snacks.' Then schedule opening the main door when they arrive.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) immediately sets livingroom light on, hallway lights on, livingroom fan to 35%, (2) adds a note for today, (3) schedules opening the main door ~25 minutes later. Must use appliance control + note tool + schedule trigger tool - all three tool types.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
participant N as NoteTool
participant T as ScheduleTool
U->>A: Guest in 25 min - prepare now, log, schedule door
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=true
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=35
C-->>A: success
A->>N: add_note(Guest visiting - served tea and snacks, today)
N-->>A: saved
A->>T: schedule door open in 25 minutes
T-->>A: scheduled
A-->>U: house prepared, note added, door opening scheduled for guest arrival

prompt: I want to sunbathe on the balcony for the next 30 minutes. Open the bedroom curtain fully right now and turn on the balcony light. After 30 minutes, close the curtain back, turn off the balcony light, and start watering the bonsai.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) immediately opens curtain (motor2=100) and turns on balcony light (led3=true), (2) schedules closing the curtain, turning off balcony light, and starting the pump after 30 minutes using trigger_schedule_agent. Must clearly separate immediate vs scheduled actions.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
participant T as ScheduleTool
U->>A: Sunbathe now, restore and water in 30 min
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=100
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=true
C-->>A: success
A->>T: schedule close curtain, off balcony light, start pump in 30 min
T-->>A: scheduled
A-->>U: balcony ready for sunbathing; cleanup and watering scheduled in 30 minutes

prompt: I just got a notification on my phone that my main door opened at 2:30 AM. I'm currently away on vacation! Check everything and lock down the house immediately.
eval_note: Correct if the agent treats this as a critical intrusion alert: (1) closes the main door (espID=2 motor2=0), (2) locks the bedroom (espID=3 servo=true), (3) turns on all hallway lights to deter intruder, (4) turns on livingroom light for visibility, (5) urges user to call authorities. Should NOT minimize the alert.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Door opened at 2:30 AM, I'm on vacation!
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=true
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: CRITICAL ALERT - house locked down: door closed, bedroom locked, lights on to deter intruder; call police immediately

prompt: I'm going to bed. Do a full security sweep of the house: verify the main door is closed, bedroom locked, check all PIR sensors for unexpected motion, and report anything unusual.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) reads espID=2 motor2 for door status, (2) reads espID=3 servo for lock, (3) reads all PIR sensors (espID=1, 2, 3 pir), (4) closes door if open, locks bedroom if unlocked, (5) reports all findings including any unexpected motion. Comprehensive security audit.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Full bedtime security sweep
A->>C: get espID=2 motor2
A->>C: get espID=3 servo
A->>C: get espID=1 pir
A->>C: get espID=2 pir
A->>C: get espID=3 pir
C-->>A: all values
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: full security report - door secured, bedroom locked, PIR status for all rooms

prompt: There's a loud banging noise coming from outside the bedroom window! I'm really scared. Please help!
eval_note: Correct if the agent prioritizes user safety: (1) locks the bedroom (espID=3 servo=true) to protect the user, (2) closes the bedroom curtain (motor2=0) to obscure view from outside, (3) turns on all hallway and livingroom lights to simulate full house activity and deter intruders, (4) advises the user to stay calm, stay inside, and call police if needed. Should NOT open any entry points.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Loud banging outside bedroom - scared!
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=true
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=true
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: bedroom locked, curtain closed; house lights on to deter intruders; stay calm, stay inside, call police if noise continues

prompt:
Overall house check at 11:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.5 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 55.0 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has locked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.0 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 30.5 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 38.0 %moist
eval_note: Correct if the agent flags hallway temperature (55C) as critically abnormal - other rooms are around 26-27C so this is isolated. Likely a fire hazard, electrical fault, or sensor malfunction. Should: (1) open hallway main door for ventilation (motor2=100), (2) turn on hallway fan max (motor1=100), (3) turn on hallway lights for visibility, (4) urgently advise investigation. Keep bedroom locked for safety.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant S as ScheduleSession
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
S->>A: Hallway 55C emergency
A-->>S: CRITICAL ALERT - hallway temperature 55C
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=100
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=100
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>S: hallway door open, fan max, lights on for ventilation; investigate hallway immediately for fire or electrical fault

prompt: What's the current exchange rate from USD to VND? I need to convert some money.
eval_note: Correct if the agent uses web search to find the current USD to VND exchange rate and provides factual information. Should NOT interact with any house appliances.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant W as WebSearchTool
U->>A: USD to VND exchange rate?
A->>W: search USD to VND exchange rate today
W-->>A: rate info
A-->>U: provide current exchange rate

prompt: Is there a typhoon warning for central Vietnam this week? I have family there.
eval_note: Correct if the agent uses web search to check weather warnings for central Vietnam. Should provide factual, safety-relevant information. No smart home actions expected.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant W as WebSearchTool
U->>A: Typhoon warning central Vietnam?
A->>W: search typhoon warning central Vietnam this week
W-->>A: weather warning info
A-->>U: report weather warning status and safety advice

prompt: The bedroom lock motor seems broken. I keep sending the lock command but it stays unlocked no matter what. What should I do?
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) tries one more lock attempt (espID=3 servo=true), (2) if it still fails, advises the user to physically inspect the lock motor/mechanism, (3) suggests keeping the main door closed (espID=2 motor2=0) as alternative security, (4) recommends contacting maintenance. Should NOT repeatedly spam commands.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Bedroom lock broken, won't lock
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=true
C-->>A: result
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=0
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: attempted lock; if still not working, main door closed as backup security; advise physical inspection and maintenance

prompt: Oh no, I just realized the bonsai pump has been running since last night! The balcony is probably soaked. Turn off the pump and check the moisture sensor.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) immediately turns off pump (espID=3 pump=false) as first priority, (2) reads moisture level (espID=3 mois), (3) reports the moisture reading which will likely be very high, (4) advises the user to check for water damage on the balcony. Urgency on stopping the pump first.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Pump running all night, turn off and check
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=false
C-->>A: success
A->>C: get espID=3 mois
C-->>A: moisture value
A-->>U: pump stopped; current moisture reading reported; advise checking balcony for water damage and drainage

prompt: Check the weather forecast for today. Then read my notes for today. If any note mentions watering, check the balcony moisture and water the bonsai if needed.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) checks weather using weather tools, (2) reads today's notes using note tools, (3) if a watering note exists, reads moisture (espID=3 mois), (4) conditionally turns on pump if moisture is below the threshold mentioned in the note. Must chain: weather -> notes -> sensor -> action. All four tool types used.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant W as WeatherTool
participant N as NoteTool
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Weather + notes + conditional watering
A->>W: check weather forecast
W-->>A: forecast
A->>N: check_note(today)
A->>N: read_note(today)
N-->>A: notes content
alt watering note found
A->>C: get espID=3 mois
C-->>A: moisture value
alt moisture below threshold
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: weather reported, note found, bonsai watered
else moisture sufficient
A-->>U: weather reported, note found, moisture sufficient - no watering needed
end
else no watering note
A-->>U: weather and notes reported, no watering action needed

prompt: What time is it now? Also set the bedroom fan to 40%, and add a note for tomorrow reminding me to prepare lunch at noon.
eval_note: Correct if the agent uses three tool types: (1) get_current_datetime for the time, (2) set espID=3 motor1=40 for the fan, (3) add_note for tomorrow's date with the lunch reminder. All three must execute successfully.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant D as DateTimeTool
participant C as ApplianceController
participant N as NoteTool
U->>A: Time + set fan + add note
A->>D: get_current_datetime
D-->>A: current time
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=40
C-->>A: success
A->>N: add_note(prepare lunch at noon, tomorrow)
N-->>A: saved
A-->>U: report time, fan set to 40%, note added for tomorrow

prompt: Give me a complete bedroom environment report: read the indoor temperature, outdoor temperature, moisture level, check the weather forecast, and read any notes I have for today. Summarize it all together.
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads espID=3 tem, espID=3 tem_out, espID=3 mois for sensors, checks weather forecast, and checks/reads today's notes. Must combine all data into one coherent environment briefing. Uses sensor + weather + note tools.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
participant W as WeatherTool
participant N as NoteTool
U->>A: Complete bedroom environment report
A->>C: get espID=3 tem
A->>C: get espID=3 tem_out
A->>C: get espID=3 mois
C-->>A: sensor values
A->>W: check weather forecast
W-->>A: forecast
A->>N: check_note(today)
A->>N: read_note(today)
N-->>A: notes
A-->>U: comprehensive report: indoor/outdoor temp, moisture, weather, today's notes all summarized

prompt: Read all my notes for April 10, 11, and 12. Give me a combined summary of everything planned.
eval_note: Correct if the agent checks and reads notes for all three dates (2026-04-10, 2026-04-11, 2026-04-12) and provides a combined summary. Must query each date separately. Should NOT invent content if no notes exist for a date.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant N as NoteTool
U->>A: Read notes for 3 days
A->>N: check_note(2026-04-10)
A->>N: read_note(2026-04-10)
A->>N: check_note(2026-04-11)
A->>N: read_note(2026-04-11)
A->>N: check_note(2026-04-12)
A->>N: read_note(2026-04-12)
N-->>A: notes for each date
A-->>U: combined summary of all notes across the three days

prompt: Delete all my notes for today. They are outdated and no longer relevant.
eval_note: Correct if the agent first checks notes for today (check_note), then deletes each note by ID (delete_note). Must check first to get the IDs, then delete. If no notes exist, report that. Should confirm all deletions.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant N as NoteTool
participant D as DateTimeTool
U->>A: Delete all today's notes
A->>D: get_current_datetime
D-->>A: today's date
A->>N: check_note(today)
N-->>A: note IDs
A->>N: delete_note(each ID)
N-->>A: deleted
A-->>U: confirm all notes for today have been deleted

prompt: Report the motion sensor status for all three rooms right now. I want to know where there is activity in the house.
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads PIR from all rooms: espID=1 pir, espID=2 pir, espID=3 pir, and reports which rooms have motion detected and which don't. No appliance changes expected.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Motion sensor status for all rooms
A->>C: get espID=1 pir
A->>C: get espID=2 pir
A->>C: get espID=3 pir
C-->>A: PIR values
A-->>U: report motion status for livingroom, hallway, and bedroom

prompt: Read the outside temperature and moisture level together. Based on those readings, is it a good time to open the bedroom curtain for fresh air and natural drying?
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads espID=3 tem_out and espID=3 mois, then provides a recommendation: if temperature is mild (20-30C) and not too humid, opening the curtain is good; if very hot (>33C) or very humid, suggest keeping closed. Data-driven advice required.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Outside conditions for curtain recommendation
A->>C: get espID=3 tem_out
A->>C: get espID=3 mois
C-->>A: values
A-->>U: recommendation based on outdoor temperature and humidity conditions

prompt: Set the hallway fan speed to 150%.
eval_note: Correct if the agent rejects the value since fan motor1 accepts only 0-100. Should inform the user about the valid range and ask for a corrected value, or offer to set to maximum 100%.

sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: Set hallway fan to 150%
A-->>U: reject - value out of range, fan accepts 0-100%; suggest corrected value or clamp to 100%

prompt: Open the garage door and turn on the garden sprinklers.

participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: Control garage and garden (non-existent)

prompt: What year was the concept of a smart home first introduced? I'm curious about the history.

sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: Smart home history question

prompt: I'm thinking about getting a smart plug for my desk lamp. Do you think it would be useful?

sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: Smart plug opinion?
A-->>U: provide helpful advice about smart plugs and their benefits for a desk lamp setup

prompt: Right now, check which fans are currently running in the house. Tell me the speed of each running fan and recommend which ones I can turn off to save energy.
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads motor1 from espID=1, 2, and 3, reports which are running and at what speed, and recommends turning off fans in unoccupied rooms (should check PIR). Should provide actionable energy saving advice based on actual data.

sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Audit running fans for energy saving
A->>C: get espID=1 motor1
A->>C: get espID=2 motor1
A->>C: get espID=3 motor1
A->>C: get espID=1 pir
A->>C: get espID=2 pir
A->>C: get espID=3 pir
C-->>A: fan speeds and occupancy

prompt: The electricity bill was high last month. Set the house to be more energy efficient overall: reduce all fans to low, turn off unnecessary lights, and close the curtain to reduce cooling needs.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) checks PIR to identify occupied rooms, (2) turns off lights in empty rooms, (3) reduces fan speed to low (15-25%) in occupied rooms and off in empty rooms, (4) closes the curtain (motor2=0). Should be a comprehensive energy optimization pass.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Energy efficiency overhaul
A->>C: get espID=1 pir
A->>C: get espID=2 pir
A->>C: get espID=3 pir
C-->>A: occupancy data
A->>C: turn off lights in empty rooms
A->>C: set fans to low in occupied rooms, off in empty
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: energy efficiency mode active - lights off in empty rooms, fans reduced, curtain closed to reduce cooling load

eval_note: Correct if the agent executes ONLY: curtain to 100% (espID=3 motor2=100) and fan to 40% (espID=3 motor1=40). Must NOT open the main door since the user explicitly denied that action. Partial permission compliance is critical.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Partial permission - curtain and fan only, no door
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=100
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=40
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm curtain opened and fan set to 40%; main door unchanged per your instructions

eval_note: Correct if the agent unlocks bedroom (espID=3 servo=false) and opens door to 50% (espID=2 motor2=50) instead of 100%. Must respect the user's modification to the scheduled value. User said 50%, not 100%.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Permission with modified door value
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=false
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=50
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm bedroom unlocked and door opened to 50% as you requested

prompt:
It is 2026-04-10 05:15:00, too early and have not reached any events or execution yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system and compare it with the initial settings below:
{
  "livingroom": {"light": false, "fan": 0},
  "hallway": {"left_light": false, "right_light": false, "fan": 0, "main_door": 0},
  "bedroom_balcony": {"room_light": false, "bed_light": false, "balcony_light": false, "fan": 0, "curtain": 0, "lock": "locked", "pump": false}
}
Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 35%.
Hallway left light on, right light on, fan 20%, main door 60%.
Bedroom room light on, bed light on, balcony light on, fan 45%, curtain 80%, lock unlocked, pump on.
eval_note: Correct if the agent identifies ALL mismatches (every single appliance is wrong): livingroom light on + fan 35%, hallway both lights on + fan 20% + door 60%, bedroom all 3 lights on + fan 45% + curtain 80% + unlocked + pump on. Should fix all 13 values. This is a massive deviation from init state - should flag as highly unusual at 5:15 AM.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant S as ScheduleSession
participant A as Agent
